description: CompositionLavender boat neck top made of 100% cotton, has mutton-leg style three-quarter sleevesFitRegularWash careHand washDo not dry clean, tumble dry, wring, or bleachDry flat in shadeCool ironThis season's fuss-free minimalistic trend is nailed in this top with its plush fabric. The puffed sleeve adds an interesting dimension to this understated top. Style this piece from s.oliver with form fitting denims, closed-toe casual shoes from enroute and a tonal sleeveless shrug.Model statisticsThe product is a size 40 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
